report.summary: Fixed critical UX bugs in yield-tokenization guide and token-security-scanner, created OG images for both pages, and improved accessibility and mobile experience for the scanner component

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed yield-tokenization-guide-2026: removed 'use client' directive that was blocking Next.js metadata export (SEO title, description, OG tags were not rendering)
Fixed yield-tokenization-guide-2026: corrected StructuredData prop from 'schema' to 'data' (component API mismatch)
Fixed yield-tokenization-guide-2026: corrected generateArticleSchema call to include required 'title', 'url', 'dateModified' fields
Fixed yield-tokenization-guide-2026: corrected combineSchemas call from array arg to spread args
Fixed TokenSecurityScanner: replaced deprecated onKeyPress with onKeyDown
Fixed TokenSecurityScanner: added Solana base58 address validation (was only accepting EVM 0x format)
Fixed TokenSecurityScanner: added click-outside-to-close for chain selector dropdown
Fixed TokenSecurityScanner: chain-aware placeholder text and error messages
Improved TokenSecurityScanner: added aria-label and aria-expanded attributes for accessibility
Improved TokenSecurityScanner: added autoComplete='off' and spellCheck={false} on address input
Improved TokenSecurityScanner: full-width scan button for better mobile touch targets
Improved TokenSecurityScanner: increased chain dropdown option padding for 44px+ touch targets

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-yield-tokenization.svg (1200x630) — PT/YT decomposition diagram with protocol stats ($5.7B TVL, 9+ chains, 50+ assets)
OG image: og-token-security-scanner.svg (1200x630) — shield visualization with security check indicators and 6-chain badges

sections.title: Files Modified
items: src/app/learn/yield-tokenization-guide-2026/page.tsx — removed 'use client', fixed metadata, StructuredData, generateArticleSchema, combineSchemas
src/components/TokenSecurityScanner.tsx — onKeyDown, Solana validation, click-outside dropdown, accessibility, mobile UX
